LUKS header information for /dev/sdb1

Version:       	1
Cipher name:   	serpent
Cipher mode:   	cbc-essiv:sha256
Hash spec:     	sha512
Payload offset:	4096
MK bits:       	256
MK digest:     	00 11 22 33 44 55 66 77 88 99 aa bb cc dd ee ff
MK salt:       	ff ee dd cc bb aa 99 88 77 66 55 44 33 22 11 00
              	ff ee dd cc bb aa 99 88 77 66 55 44 33 22 11 00
MK iterations: 	42000
UUID:          	11111111-2222-3333-4444-555555555555

Key Slot 0: DISABLED
Key Slot 1: DISABLED
Key Slot 2: DISABLED
Key Slot 3: DISABLED
Key Slot 4: DISABLED
Key Slot 5: DISABLED
Key Slot 6: DISABLED
Key Slot 7: DISABLED
